reviews.comment:
Bien atendido, con aseos limpios y cómodos pese a que estaba colmado de turistas....

(Translated by Google)
Well-staffed, with clean and comfortable restrooms despite being packed with tourists....
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvNHI3VnFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un oasis, un lugar que se disfruta al llegar, muy buena atencion y sus precios muy aceptables

(Translated by Google)
An oasis, a place you'll enjoy from the moment you arrive, excellent service and very reasonable prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvZ3VmMnhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atención expedita en el servicentro. Adjunto se encuentra un restaurante,  el cual tiene buena carta de alimentos para los viajeros, carece de suficiente personal, por lo cual se retrasan mucho al servir y entregar la cuenta

(Translated by Google)
The service station offers prompt service. Adjacent to it is a restaurant with a good menu for travelers, but it lacks sufficient staff, resulting in significant delays in service and bill delivery.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvbk1pYzlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Trato de no cargar en esta estación
No te cargan más de 20 LTS en los tanques de la embarcación, por más que los tanques sean homologados
Una total ridiculez, ellos saben que en Pehuenia, no se puede cargar, porque es un desastre

(Translated by Google)
I try not to fill up at this station.
They won't let you fill up with more than 20 liters in your boat's tanks, even if they're certified.
It's ridiculous; they know you can't fill up in Pehuenia because it's a disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvN05MRk1REAE

reviews.comment:
Es una YPF

(Translated by Google)
It's a YPF
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvelB5RjJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El precio del combustible coincide con todas Las YPF, los baños están limpios , pero los precios de la tienda están remarcados un 60%. Exageradamente Caro todo! Y la atención es mala.

(Translated by Google)
The fuel prices are the same as all YPF stores, the restrooms are clean, but the store prices are marked up by 60%. Everything is outrageously expensive! And the service is poor.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvdUpxMThnRRAB

reviews.comment:

Station with a place to refuel but expensive

Extremely expensive... A rip-off for travelers

reviews.comment:
Desastreeeeee. Bebida caliente, los platos son chicos y caros.. no lo recomiendo!!!

(Translated by Google)
Disaster! The drinks were hot, the portions were small and expensive... I don't recommend it at all!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNva01LZS1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Me atendieron mal, me trajeron la cerveza tibia, mi jermu pidió una ensalada cesar y le trajeron cómo adereso una salsa hecha con mostaza, nada que ver y yo pedí un matambre a la pizza con papas y parecía un menú infantil de lo chico que era, no lo recomiendo!!!

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible, the beer was lukewarm, my wife ordered a Caesar salad and they brought her a dressing made with mustard, which was completely different, and I ordered a matambre a la pizza with potatoes and it was so small it looked like a children's meal. I don't recommend it at all!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNva1B5eVhREAE
